title: codereview: tdma_slot expected_slot=3 may not match CRC16(EUI64) mod 16
description: Verify the hash computation for static slot assignment in new vectors. Independent oracle should use exact CRC16 poly 0x1021 init 0x0000 on the 8 bytes.
close_reason: All codereview findings fixed: slot now matches CRC16=1, drift_ppm=5000 for exact 50ms guard match, _write call added to main+generated successfully, README updated; 3 clean passes with no new P0-P2 findings after fixes
